categories.name: Design Decision
categories.warranted: Chose between alternatives, non-obvious approach, or architectural trade-off
categories.namingRules: Derive {topic} from issue title, kebab-case, max 50 chars. If exists, append -2, -3, etc.

categories.name: Tech Debt
categories.warranted: Took a shortcut, deferred work, or introduced known limitations
categories.namingRules: Derive {topic} from issue title, kebab-case, max 50 chars. If exists, append -2, -3, etc.

notWarrantedCheckbox: [x] No design decisions warranted — implementation was straightforward
